description: Implement the Playwright test in `e2e/app.spec.js` for the Course Marketplace home page. Application code is correct and matches `main`; your job is test automation only. The spec must verify that the public home loads: document title matches Course Marketplace, loading and error states resolve, the level-1 heading "Course Marketplace" is visible, and the tagline about browsing courses appears. Before submit, verify from the repo root with **`npm run test:e2e:assignment`** — it runs only `e2e/app.spec.js`, matching what Savyre scores (`playwrightQaE2ePaths`). Do not hardcode ports.
expectedOutcome: **`npm run test:e2e:assignment` passes**: Playwright uses BASE_URL from the runner, asserts title / h1 / tagline per the task, with no flaky hardcoded URLs. Same UI contract as the reference implementation on `main`. Optional: `npm run test:e2e` runs all files under `e2e/`.
hint: Use `page.goto('/')` then assertions on title, `getByRole('heading', …)`, and visible text. Prefer `npm run test:e2e:assignment` so local runs match Savyre (`playwrightQaE2ePaths: ["e2e/app.spec.js"]`).
